title: Elbow Grease Cream Cleaner With Micro Crystals - Mild Abrasive Action | Hobs, Sinks, Bathrooms, Kitchens, Patios - Removes Tough & Stubborn Stains (Pink Blush, 540g)
features: MULTI SURFACE CLEANER: A must-have for any home, this powerful formula works on kitchen hobs, sinks, tiles, and even ovens. It's also ideal as a bathroom cleaner, making tiles and baths shine while easily cutting through soap scum and watermarks.

MICRO CRYSTAL POWER: Containing micro crystals, this cream cleaner delivers an effective clean by breaking down dirt and grime. It tackles even the toughest stains on kitchen and bathroom surfaces, giving a polished, streak-free finish without the need for excessive scrubbing.

GENTLE YET TOUGH FORMULA: The mild abrasive action ensures deep cleaning without damaging delicate surfaces. Use it on ceramic hobs, stainless steel sinks, and even glossy tiles for a sparkling clean home without the risk of scratching.

VERSATILE OUTDOOR CLEANING: Not just for indoors! Use it as a patio cleaner to remove dirt, moss, and stains from patio slabs and garden furniture. Restore the look of outdoor surfaces with minimal effort and maximum results.

EFFECTIVE OVEN CLEANER: Struggling with burnt-on grease? This cream cleaner makes oven cleaning effortless. Simply apply, wipe, and rinse to remove tough stains, grease, and food residues, leaving ovens and air fryers looking as good as new.
FRESH INVIGORATING SCENTS: Choose between zesty Lemon or fruity Pink Blush (Grapefruit) for a fresh, clean-smelling home. These fresh fragrances leave a clean fresh smell wherever used.

PERFECT FOR BATHROOMS: Tackle limescale, soap scum, and grime with ease. This Elbow Grease cream cleaner is ideal for use as a bathroom cleaner on sinks, baths, and tiles. Restore surfaces to their original shine while effortlessly lifting away dirt and stains.

IDEAL FOR EVERYDAY : Whether dealing with kitchen spills, bathroom grime, or outdoor stains, this cleaner is a household essential. It works quickly to break down grease and dirt, saving time and effort on daily cleaning tasks.

SAFE & EASY TO USE: Elbow Grease Cream Cleaner has a thick, creamy consistency clings to surfaces, providing long-lasting cleaning power without drips or waste. Simply apply with a damp cloth, wipe, and rinse away residue for a sparkling clean.

TRUSTED BY HOMES NATIONWIDE: Elbow Grease is renowned for its high-performance cleaning products. This cream cleaner is no exception—effective, reliable, and a staple for homes that demand powerful cleaning without harsh chemicals.
description: Product Description Give your home a deep clean with Elbow Grease Cream Cleaner, the ultimate solution for tackling stubborn stains and grime. Infused with micro crystals, this powerful formula works wonders on hobs, sinks, bathrooms, kitchens, and even outdoor surfaces. The mild abrasive action lifts away dirt without scratching, leaving surfaces sparkling clean. Whether it's a ceramic hob cleaner for everyday messes or an oven cleaner for baked-on grease, this versatile cream does it all. Available in refreshing Lemon or Pink Blush (Grapefruit) scents, it leaves your home smelling fresh while delivering unbeatable cleaning results. Ingredients <5% Anionic Surfactants, Non - Ionic Surfactants, Soap. Also contains: Perfume, DMDM Hydantoin. Directions Apply the cream directly onto the surface using a damp cloth. Wipe gently then rinse thoroughly. Manufacturer Contact Information Elbow Grease Pink Cream Cleaner 540g See more
